responseMessageContents.text:
The tunnel process got killed and port 8081 is no longer listening, so I need to restart the expo tunnel from scratch. I'll kill any stale processes, restart the tunnel with `bunx expo start --tunnel`, and grab the new URL from the expo settings—the URL randomness should persist so it'll likely be the same one, then I can share it along with a QR code.

For the QR code, I'm generating it locally using a QR code library and rendering it as ASCII art with block characters in a code block so it's scannable in the chat, or I can just provide the https URL directly for manual entry into Expo Go.
The tunnel died again (the background Metro process was terminated after my last turn ended — sandbox background processes don't persist between turns). Restarting fresh and verifying before sharing:
